news.headline: Israeli Military: We have started a wave of strikes against dozens of surface-to-surface missile targets in western Iran.

news.summary: In New York, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) shared the unfortunate news of the passing of their Chairman Emeritus Leonard A. Lauder, at the age of 92, on June 14. Born in 1933 in New York City to Estée and Joseph H. Lauder, the company's founders, he was the oldest son. Leonard A. Lauder graduated from the Bronx High School of Science, the University of Pennsylvania’s Wharton School, and the Officer Candidate School of the United States Navy.
news.headline: Cosmetics industry pioneer Leonard A. Lauder, Chairman Emeritus of The Estée Lauder Companies, passed away at 92.

news.summary: During Coinbase's Crypto Summit, Chris LaCivita, a Trump ally, emphasized the GOP's acknowledgment of the significance of the crypto community.
news.headline: GOP strategist reveals Bitcoin's role in GOP's 2024 win at Coinbase event. LaCivita highlights crypto's impact on Republicans.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 9.3%, with a total of 15.7 million people currently out of work. This marks a significant increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the report highlighted that the GDP growth for the same period was only 1.2%, falling short of initial projections. Experts are attributing these disappointing numbers to the ongoing global economic challenges and uncertainties. Job losses were most prominent in the manufacturing and service sectors, with many businesses struggling to stay afloat amidst the current economic climate. The government has announced plans to introduce new stimulus measures to address the growing unemployment crisis and boost economic growth in the coming months.
news.headline: California is urging appeals court to prevent the use of National Guard.
Tzachi Hanegbi dismissed rumors of Trump vetoing Israeli plan to target Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

news.summary: TORONTO--NDP Member of Provincial Parliament for University-Rosedale, Jessica Bell, is set to show her support for the 3,600 striking members of the Ontario Compensation Employees Union (OCEU/CUPE 1750) by joining them on the picket line at 200 Front Street West on Monday, June 16 at 11:15 a.m. The OCEU members have been on strike for four weeks now, demanding fair wages, safe working conditions, and an end to the outsourcing of Ontario jobs to U.S.-based companies. The workers are calling for better treatment and a halt to the privatization of their jobs.
news.headline: NDP MPP Jessica Bell supports 3,600 striking WSIB workers at picket line for fair wages and job protection.
One Israeli official told Axios that Israel is not interested in a ceasefire at this time because it has not yet achieved all of its goals, particularly in destroying Iran's nuclear program
Two US Officials: Trump in the last couple of days vetoed an Israeli plan to kill Iran's Supreme Leader.

news.summary: Wall Street research desks are closely monitoring the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint where nearly 20% of the world's oil supply passes through. The recent strikes on Iran's nuclear facilities by Israel have heightened concerns about a potential crude supply shock. Situated between Iran and Oman, this narrow waterway features just two shipping lanes, each a mere 2 nautical miles wide, leaving global oil flows vulnerable to disruptions. The escalating tensions between Israel and Iran have raised alarm among investors and are seen as a significant threat to the global economy. Following a 12% weekly increase in oil prices, as per the United States Oil Fund, the possibility of oil soaring above $100 is considered a growing risk. For the full article, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Strait of Hormuz poses global risk with 20% oil flow, Israel-Iran tensions. Oil prices may soar to $100 - a major concern for investors.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking phase 4 study presented at EAACI, Dupixent was found to be more effective than Xolair (omalizumab) in treating chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps in patients with asthma. This head-to-head respiratory study showcased Dupixent's superiority over Xolair, marking a significant advancement in the treatment of this condition. Notable variations were observed in key efficacy metrics, emphasizing the potential of Dupixent as a preferred treatment option.
news.headline: Dupixent outperformed Xolair in chronic rhinosinusitis + nasal polyps + asthma study. EAACI reports findings.

news.summary: At the recent EAACI conference, new data revealed that Dupixent demonstrated superior effectiveness compared to Xolair in a study focusing on Chronic Rhinosinusitis with Nasal Polyps (CRSwNP). Dupixent outperformed Xolair in all primary and secondary efficacy measures related to CRSwNP, as well as in various asthma-related endpoints. The findings highlight the effectiveness of Dupixent in improving outcomes for patients with these conditions.
news.headline: Dupixent proved better than Xolair in treating Chronic Rhinosinusitis with Nasal Polyps and asthma in a Phase 4 trial.

news.summary: Although the cryptocurrency market is expanding quickly and operates in a decentralized manner, its liquidity is still divided and delicate. This instability mirrors the risks present in traditional financial systems, making the market susceptible to sudden disruptions when investor sentiment changes. This highlights the importance of understanding the market's dynamics and potential risks to avoid negative impacts.
news.headline: Crypto's liquidity, though fragmented, poses a risk. It could lead to sudden market shocks if sentiment changes.

news.summary: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent clinical-stage gene editing company listed on NASDAQ as NTLA, reported three-year follow-up data on June 15, 2025. The data was derived from the Phase 1 segment of an ongoing Phase 1/2 trial involving patients with HAE who were treated with a single dose of lonvoguran ziclumeran (also called lonvo-z or NTLA-2002). The results were presented at the European Academy of Allergy and Clinical Immunology (EAACI) Congress 2025 in Glasgow, United Kingdom, which took place from June 13-16.
news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics reports positive 3-year data from HAE trial at EAACI Congress. Lonvo-z (NTLA-2002) shows promise.

news.summary: On June 15, 2025, a prominent renewable energy solutions provider, Scatec ASA, entered into a 25-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) valued at USD for a 900 MW wind project with the Egyptian Electricity Transmission Company (EETC). This agreement was made through their specialized project entity, “Shadwan Wind Power SAE,” aiming to fast-track Egypt's shift towards a more environmentally friendly and sustainable energy composition.
news.headline: Scatec signs PPA for 900MW onshore wind project in Egypt with EETC for 25 years, aiding Egypt's sustainable energy plan.

news.summary: On June 15, 2025, Scatec ASA successfully achieved financial close for the "Obelisk" project, a hybrid solar and battery storage venture in Egypt. This development marks a significant milestone for the company in advancing renewable energy initiatives.
news.headline: Scatec secures financial close for 1.1GW solar + 100MW/200MWh BESS Obelisk project in Egypt. Oslo/Cairo, 15 June 2025.

news.summary: In Innsbruck, Austria on June 15, 2025, Andreas Clementi, the CEO and founder of AV-Comparatives, emphasized the importance of effective detection in light of evolving cyberattacks. He introduced the 2025 EDR/XDR Certification as a tool for CISOs to evaluate the efficiency of their cybersecurity tools in identifying subtle, genuine threats. This certification aims to provide a comprehensive assessment rather than a mere checkbox approach.
news.headline: AV-Comparatives CEO Andreas Clementi announces 2025 EDR/XDR Certification for CISOs to detect real-world threats effectively.

Analysts are keeping an eye on potential AI winners following the recent successes of Nvidia and Broadcom.
news.headline: Israel targets Iran energy assets. Will AI stocks follow Nvidia, Broadcom's success? Impacts on Dow Jones futures discussed.

news.summary: Last week, eleven large-cap stocks underperformed, with The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE: SJM) stock dropping by 13.67% due to mixed fourth-quarter financial results and a fiscal year 2026 EPS guidance below expectations, leading to analysts lowering their price forecasts. Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) stock also fell by 13.57% as the company issued a lower-than-expected fiscal year 2025 sales outlook despite strong first-quarter earnings, prompting analysts to revise their forecasts downward. The details regarding Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Top 11 large cap losers last week include J. M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) down by 13.67% and Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) down by 13.57%.

news.summary: In Neptune City, N.J., Nylabone, a well-known brand under Central Garden & Pet (NASDAQ: CENT) (NASDAQ: CENTA), is introducing a new product to their Nubz® dog treat line. The Nubz® Flavor Bursts chew treats are made with real cheddar cheese and bacon flavor, designed to enhance the snacking experience for dogs. These natural chew treats contain savory flavor bursts thanks to innovative technology. This launch comes just in time for summer, adding more excitement to treat time for canine companions.
news.headline: Nylabone introduces Nubz Flavor Bursts chew treats, adding cheddar cheese and bacon flavors to the popular Nubz dog treat line.

news.summary: The recent performance of BlackRock's Bitcoin fund showcases its popularity among investors, notably financial advisors. This success highlights both the strong reputation of the company and the increasing acceptance of cryptocurrencies in the investment world.
